turns.content: What should I make for dinner tonight with chicken and rice?

📋 SUMMARY: Five chicken and rice dinner ideas using what's in season in San Diego right now.

🔍 ANALYSIS: February in San Diego has great citrus (lemon, orange), greens (broccoli, kale, arugula), and root veggies (carrot, beet) in peak season. Avocado is coming in. These pair perfectly with chicken and rice.

⚡ ACTIONS: Searched recipes, checked seasonal produce for San Diego February.

✅ RESULTS: Here are 5 ideas, best-first:

---

### 1. Lemon Herb Chicken & Rice (One-Pot)
**Time:** 35 min | **Difficulty:** Easy
Sear chicken thighs skin-on, then cook rice in the same pot with broth, lemon juice, garlic, and rosemary. Finish with a squeeze of fresh lemon and chopped cilantro.
- **Seasonal stars:** Lemon, rosemary, cilantro (all peak)

### 2. Greek Chicken Rice Bowl with Arugula
**Time:** 30 min | **Difficulty:** Easy
Marinate chicken in lemon-oregano-garlic, grill or pan-sear. Serve over rice with arugula, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, feta, and a quick tzatziki.
- **Seasonal stars:** Arugula, lemon (peak), avocado (coming in)

### 3. Chicken & Broccoli Rice Casserole
**Time:** 45 min | **Difficulty:** Easy
A comfort classic — chicken, rice, broccoli, and a creamy sauce baked until bubbly. Skip the canned soup and make a quick roux with broth and cheese.
- **Seasonal stars:** Broccoli (peak)

### 4. Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowls
**Time:** 25 min | **Difficulty:** Easy
Quick homemade teriyaki glaze on pan-seared chicken thighs. Serve over rice with steamed snap peas, shredded carrot, and sesame seeds.
- **Seasonal stars:** Snap peas, carrots (peak)

### 5. Cilantro-Lime Chicken & Rice Skillet
**Time:** 30 min | **Difficulty:** Easy
One-pan — cook chicken with cumin and chili powder, add rice and broth, finish with lime and tons of fresh cilantro. Top with avocado.
- **Seasonal stars:** Cilantro (peak), avocado (coming in)

---

**Pro tip:** Use chicken thighs over breasts — they're juicier and almost impossible to overcook.

📊 STATUS: Ready for you to pick one — I can give you the full recipe with ingredients and steps.

📁 CAPTURE: Jm looking for chicken + rice dinner ideas, Feb 2026.

➡️ NEXT: Pick a dish and I'll pull up the full recipe, check what you need, and can generate a grocery list or send it to Instacart.

📖 STORY EXPLANATION:
1. Jm has chicken and rice and wants dinner ideas
2. Checked San Diego February seasonal produce — citrus, greens, and root veggies are peaking
3. Lemon herb one-pot is the top pick: minimal cleanup, uses peak-season lemon, rosemary, and cilantro
4. Greek bowl option adds freshness with arugula and a quick tzatziki
5. Broccoli casserole is the comfort-food route with peak-season broccoli
6. Teriyaki bowls are the fastest option at 25 minutes using seasonal snap peas and carrots
7. Cilantro-lime skillet brings Southwestern flavor with avocado just coming into season
8. All five recipes are weeknight-friendly at 25-45 minutes for two people

⭐ RATE (1-10):

🗣️ Kaya: Five chicken rice dinners using peak February produce. Lemon herb one-pot is my top pick.

Sources:
- [26 Chicken and Rice Dishes - The Kitchn](https://www.thekitchn.com/chicken-rice-dishes-23753036)
- [Easy Chicken and Rice - A Couple Cooks](https://www.acouplecooks.com/chicken-and-rice-recipe/)
- [20 Best Chicken and Rice Recipes - Food Network](https://www.foodnetwork.com/recipes/photos/chicken-and-rice-recipes)
- [20 Quick Chicken and Rice Recipes - Gusto Meadow](https://gustomeadow.com/quick-chicken-and-rice-recipes/)
